div.head: Mr. Wharton to Mr. Mizner.
div.p: Mr. Wharton instructs Mr. Ryan, at the City of Mexico, to telegraph Mr. Mizner that the Department directs him to proceed to San José de Guatemala immediately, there to await further instructions, after providing for communication with the naval vessels of the United States at that port and arranging prompt telegraphic facilities with the legation at Guatemala City, and thence with Mr. Ryan, at the City of Mexico. Also to answer this instruction through the legation in Mexico promptly.
